title: sanguisorba officinalis f. auriculata
intro: Sanguisorba officinalis f. auriculata, also known as Red Elder or Bloodwort, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its astringent and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and flavonoids. The health benefits associated with this plant include its ability to stop bleeding, reduce inflammation, and aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues. Sanguisorba officinalis f. auriculata can be prepared into herbal infusions, teas, or tinctures, and is often used to support wound healing and digestive health.
